channel.title: Windows on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Windows on ExitCode0

item.title: How to invoke UAC in a Windows Batch script
item.description: Trigger a UAC elevation prompt from a Windows batch script using a VBScript helper. Re-run the original script with administrator privileges automatically when accepted.

item.title: How to check if RAM is running in ECC mode
item.description: Check whether system RAM supports ECC error correction on Windows and Linux. Use dmidecode or WMIC commands to verify ECC memory installation in servers and workstations.

item.title: Adding WMIC command to the Windows path
item.description: Add C:\Windows\System32\wbem to Windows PATH to restore the wmic command. Fix 'wmic is not recognized' errors on Windows 10 after system updates or environment variable changes.

item.title: Prevent Screensavers and Lock-screens with Powershell
item.description: Prevent the Windows screensaver and lock screen activating using a PowerShell SendKeys loop. Keep a PC awake indefinitely with a timed keypress — no Group Policy changes needed.

item.title: Modifying Windows shortcuts is Powershell
item.description: Recursively update Windows shortcut targets in PowerShell using WScript.Shell COM objects. Batch-fix broken .lnk files after moving applications or changing drive letters.
